details: Stage 1 data_pipeline: Implemented reader (RM stick batching into tile-sized CB pages), compute (tilize+untilize passthrough), writer (extract sticks from untilized CB). Fixed program descriptor: nblocks_per_core now passed as runtime arg to compute.
Stage 1 data_pipeline PASSED all 4 shapes: (1,1,32,32), (1,1,64,128), (1,1,32,256), (4,2,64,64). Test: tests/ttnn/unit_tests/operations/layer_norm_rm/test_stage_data_pipeline.py
Stage 2 reduce_mean: Added Phase 2 (reduce SUM_ROW with NoWaitNoPop on cb_tilized) and Phase 3 (sub COL broadcast with manual pop of cb_tilized). Untilize now reads from cb_centered.
Stage 2 reduce_mean PASSED all 4 shapes: (1,1,32,32), (1,1,64,128), (1,1,32,256), (4,2,64,64). Test: tests/ttnn/unit_tests/operations/layer_norm_rm/test_stage_reduce_mean.py
Stage 3 variance_normalize: Added Phases 4-6 (square, reduce var, add_eps+rsqrt, mul inv_std). Reader now fills cb_eps with bfloat16 epsilon. Fixed cb_var_input to Wt pages. Untilize from cb_normed.
Stage 3 variance_normalize PASSED all 4 shapes: (1,1,32,32), (1,1,64,128), (1,1,32,256), (4,2,64,64). Test: tests/ttnn/unit_tests/operations/layer_norm_rm/test_stage_variance_normalize.py

Stage 4 affine_transform: Reader reads gamma/beta via TensorAccessor with stick replication (1 stick -> 32 sticks). Compute tilizes gamma/beta, then mul<NONE> and add<NONE>. Reuses cb_tilized and cb_centered as intermediates. Program descriptor updated with gamma/beta TensorAccessorArgs.
Stage 4 affine_transform PASSED all 4 shapes: (1,1,32,32), (1,1,64,128), (1,1,32,256), (4,2,64,64). Test: tests/ttnn/unit_tests/operations/layer_norm_rm/test_stage_affine_transform.py
